message:
Add TTY vs pipe output mode E2E tests

Add comprehensive tests verifying CLI output mode switching behavior:
- Piped output (non-TTY) defaults to JSON format
- Explicit --json flag always produces JSON
- show/search commands output JSON in piped mode
- help command outputs JSON in piped mode
- Error output is JSON in piped mode
- categories/tags commands require explicit --json flag

All 53 CLI E2E tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
